zh: AREX 仁川 T1 到金浦
google_maps_origin: Incheon Airport Terminal 1, 272 Gonghang-ro, Yeongjong-gu, Incheon
note_zh: 仁川 T1 先坐 AREX 到金浦机场换乘。
note_en: Take AREX from ICN T1 to Gimpo Airport transfer.
label: AREX 仁川 T1 到金浦 / AREX ICN T1 to Gimpo

note_zh: 行李多时可考虑 6103 机场大巴直达 COEX / 三成一侧。
note_en: With luggage, consider the 6103 airport bus directly to the COEX / Samseong side.
label: 6103 机场大巴 / 6103 airport limousine bus

note_zh: 会场到江南、圣水、弘大都可用 Line 2 作为主轴。
note_en: Line 2 is the main axis for Gangnam, Seongsu, and Hongdae.
label: Line 2 核心线 / Line 2 core

google_maps_destination: COEX Convention & Exhibition Center, 513 Yeongdong-daero, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
note_zh: 金浦换乘 Line 9 到奉恩寺站，7 号出口到 COEX。
note_en: Transfer to Line 9 at Gimpo, ride to Bongeunsa, then walk to COEX.
label: Line 9 金浦到奉恩寺 / Line 9 Gimpo to Bongeunsa

google_maps_origin: Hotel Provista Seoul, 338 Seocho-daero, Seocho-gu, Seoul 06632
google_maps_destination: COEX Convention & Exhibition Center, 513 Yeongdong-daero, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
note_zh: 普罗威斯塔酒店从教大/Line 2 到三成，再步行到 COEX。
note_en: From Provista, use Line 2 toward Samseong, then walk to COEX.
label: Line 2 酒店到三成 / Line 2 hotel to Samseong

google_maps_origin: COEX Convention & Exhibition Center, 513 Yeongdong-daero, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
note_zh: 大多数科技公司社交、晚宴、meetup 的第一候选区域。
note_en: First-choice zone for many tech socials, dinners, and meetups.
label: 江南晚间圈 / Gangnam evening loop

google_maps_origin: COEX Convention & Exhibition Center, 513 Yeongdong-daero, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
note_zh: 晚餐和酒吧可选，深夜可考虑出租车。
note_en: Good for dinner and bars; taxi may be simpler late night.
label: 梨泰院方向 / Itaewon direction

google_maps_origin: COEX Convention & Exhibition Center, 513 Yeongdong-daero, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
note_zh: 只建议给重要 offsite 留整晚。
note_en: Reserve a full evening only for important offsites.
label: 板桥远端活动 / Pangyo offsite
